testsuite.name: com.example.macronews.service.news.NewsApiServiceImplTest

testcase.name: fetchTopHeadlines should encode the recent query before calling NewsAPI
fetchTopHeadlines should prefer fresh recent articles and exclude old ones
fetchTopHeadlines should merge recent search with top headlines when recent search underfills

testsuite.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK.
